name: Resident Evil | Biohazard [RPG]
description:
🔫|Role-playing game based on RE:4 Remake.

You are in Resident Evil 4 Remake, your mission is whatever you want. Along the way you will meet people like Luis Sera, Leon Kennedy, Ashley Graham and Ada Wong. You will have to face the Spanish cattle (that is, zombies), led by Lord Sadler's sect.
creator: Anon_Gurl
